__faion_header__.purpose: Minimum viable filled-in bundle for validator round-trip

decision_title: Adopt Postgres-only persistence; defer Redis cache to Phase 2
key_risk: Read-heavy endpoints will hit p95 latency ceiling at ~5x current load; Phase 2 cache rollout is on the critical path for 10x growth.

exec_summary.body: We are standardising on Postgres for the next 18 months and deferring Redis. Key risk: Read-heavy endpoints will hit p95 latency ceiling at ~5x current load; Phase 2 cache rollout is on the critical path for 10x growth. Re-evaluate Q3.

pm_brief.body: Phase 2 cache rollout becomes P0. Key risk: Read-heavy endpoints will hit p95 latency ceiling at ~5x current load; Phase 2 cache rollout is on the critical path for 10x growth.
pm_brief.roadmap_impact: Phase 2 (Q3) adds a 4-week cache rollout task.

engineer_note.body: Postgres-only Phase 1. Key risk: Read-heavy endpoints will hit p95 latency ceiling at ~5x current load; Phase 2 cache rollout is on the critical path for 10x growth.

ops_delta.body: Single oncall surface. Key risk: Read-heavy endpoints will hit p95 latency ceiling at ~5x current load; Phase 2 cache rollout is on the critical path for 10x growth.
